strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack and distributed-systems engineering experience
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth (credit risk, liquidity, compliance across jurisdictions)
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong distributed-systems, full-stack, and craftsmanship credentials, and some recent contact with agentic AI tooling. However, the role is an executive CTO position requiring proven leadership scaling 10-to-30+ engineering organizations, production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech, and deep credit/liquidity domain expertise — none of which are clearly demonstrated in the resume.
